USP.data_provenance_note: Based on founder-submitted claims, auto-verified against competitor pages.

PRICING.target_customer: Mid-market legal ops and procurement teams at companies with 200–2000 employees
PRICING.who_pays_vs_who_uses: Legal ops or procurement budget owner pays; in-house lawyers and contract managers use it daily
PRICING.paying_segment: Legal Operations Manager or VP of Procurement
PRICING.ai_pricing_summary: The startup employs a Subscription pricing model targeting Mid-market legal ops and procurement teams at companies with 200–2000 employees based on Per seat, per month in the $120–$350/seat/month depending on tier (Starter / Professional / Enterprise) range. This approach is typical for the B2B SaaS sector in 2026, focusing on scalability through value-based unit economics.
PRICING.analyst_notes: Pre-revenue; 3 LOIs signed at $2,400 ARR/seat target. Pricing benchmarked against Ironclad (est. $150–$400/seat) and ContractPodAi (est. $200–$500/seat). Discounts planned for deal sizes >50 seats.

TECH.tech_description: Core NLP pipeline built on fine-tuned LegalBERT with a proprietary graph database layer (Neo4j-based) for cross-contract dependency mapping. Inference latency <200ms p95 on a 50-page contract. Obligation graph algorithm is novel — no public equivalent found in LegalTech literature.
TECH.data_provenance_note: Build depth: founder-submitted, evidence required at level ≥50. Patent status: Founder-declared Pending, unverified.
